meta.title: Bonfire Guild
meta.description: Bonfire Guild is a way for our community to get more involved - with early access to recordings, behind-the-scenes content, and a say in what comes next.

guildPage.subtitle: A place for folks who want to get more involved. Early access to recordings, behind-the-scenes stuff, and a real say in where Bonfire goes next.
guildPage.openNote: Bonfire events are <bold>open to everyone</bold> - no membership required. Guild is simply an optional way for those who want to support what we do and help the community grow.

newsletter.subtitle: Get notified when Bonfire Guild begins its rollout.

tiersSection.title: Pick What Fits
tiersSection.subtitle: Three tiers for different levels of involvement. Start wherever you like and grow from there.

scout.name: Scout
scout.tagline: Hop in and see what's cooking.

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.tagline: Early access to recordings and a say in what's next.

trailblazer.name: Trailblazer
trailblazer.tagline: Help us shape what Bonfire becomes.
features: First look at new platform features

perksSection.title: The Perks
perksSection.subtitle: Guild is about getting closer to the action - seeing how things come together and helping us figure out what to do next.

items.title: Early Recordings
items.description: Watch the talks before they go public. Simple as that.

items.title: Behind the Scenes
items.description: Planning sessions, backstage prep, raw crew moments. The stuff that doesn't make the highlight reel.

items.title: Have a Say
items.description: Help pick topics, suggest speakers, and shape what Bonfire does next. Your voice matters here.

items.title: Hang With the Crew
items.description: Private channels with speakers, crew, and fellow members. A chill space to chat and share ideas.

scout.title: Guild badge on your profile
scout.description: A visible signal that you back Bonfire and want to be part of the inner circle.

scout.title: Member-only Discord channels
scout.description: A quieter space for Guild members to talk with the crew and with each other.

scout.title: Early heads-up on upcoming events
scout.description: Get the details before the public drop so you can plan ahead instead of rushing.

scout.title: Priority event registration
scout.description: A better shot at getting in when seats are limited or demand spikes.

explorer.title: Everything in Scout
explorer.description: You keep the core Guild perks and add the benefits that make the subscription feel immediately useful.

explorer.title: Early access to event recordings
explorer.description: Watch talks before the public release and stay in the loop while the event is still fresh.

explorer.title: Vote on future talk topics
explorer.description: Help steer the program toward the themes and questions you actually want explored next.

explorer.title: Behind-the-scenes content
explorer.description: See the planning, the tradeoffs, and the raw moments that never make it into the polished recap.

trailblazer.title: Everything in Explorer
trailblazer.description: You get the full recording and behind-the-scenes package, plus the closest connection to how Bonfire evolves.

trailblazer.title: Join crew planning calls
trailblazer.description: Hear what is being discussed early and bring your perspective into the room.

trailblazer.title: Suggest speakers and topics
trailblazer.description: Surface the people and ideas you think Bonfire should prioritize next.

trailblazer.title: First look at new platform features
trailblazer.description: Preview experiments before everyone else and help shape what is worth keeping.

cta.title: Start From Your Account
cta.body: Pick a tier here, then continue in your account to launch Stripe checkout or open the billing portal for management.
